info.name: Voclio API - Complete Collection
info.description: Complete API documentation for Voclio - Voice-powered task management platform

item.name: Authentication
item.description: User authentication and account management endpoints

request.description: Login with email and password. Automatically saves tokens.
Get new access token using refresh token
Send OTP to email. Types: login, registration, password_reset, email_verification

query.description: Filter by status: pending, in_progress, completed
Filter by priority: low, medium, high, urgent

request.description: Get all tasks with optional filters
Get tasks for a specific date
Get a specific task by ID
Get task with all its subtasks
Get all subtasks of a task

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Complete project documentation",
  "description": "Write comprehensive API documentation",
  "status": "pending",
  "priority": "high",
  "due_date": "2026-04-30T17:00:00Z",
  "category_id": 1,
  "note_id": null,
  "voice_recording_id": null
}

request.description: Create a subtask for a parent task
Upload audio, transcribe, and extract tasks/notes in one request. Returns job IDs for tracking.
Check the status of a processing job
Upload a voice recording to cloud storage
Get details of a specific recording
Get all notes with optional search
Generate AI summary of a note
Extract tasks from note content using AI
Get all tags for a note
Remove a tag from a note
Snooze a reminder for specified minutes

body.raw:
{
  "email_enabled": true,
  "push_enabled": true,
  "whatsapp_enabled": false,
  "email_for_reminders": true,
  "email_for_tasks": true,
  "whatsapp_for_reminders": false
}

item.name: Productivity
item.description: Productivity tracking and focus session endpoints

request.description: Start a new focus session (Pomodoro timer)
Get current and longest productivity streak
Get productivity summary for a period
Get calendar view for a specific month
Get all events for a specific day
Get Google OAuth URL to connect calendar
Get Google OAuth URL for mobile apps
Test Google Calendar with existing tokens
Link OAuth session to user account
Handle Google OAuth callback for mobile
Get Webex OAuth URL to connect

query.description: Alternative: get meetings for next N days

request.description: Get Webex meetings in date range

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Team Standup",
  "start": "2026-04-26T10:00:00Z",
  "end": "2026-04-26T10:30:00Z",
  "agenda": "Daily team sync",
  "password": "Meeting123",
  "timezone": "America/New_York",
  "enabledAutoRecordMeeting": false,
  "allowAnyUserToBeCoHost": true,
  "enabledJoinBeforeHost": true,
  "publicMeeting": false,
  "sendEmail": true
}

request.description: Get details of a specific Webex meeting
Activate or deactivate a user (admin only)
Grant or revoke admin role (admin only)
Delete multiple users at once (admin only)
Get AI usage breakdown by user (admin only)
Get content statistics (tasks, notes, etc.) (admin only)
Check API health status (no auth required)
